[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 10010000 2
3 10110010 4
4 00100000 1
5 10001100 3
6 10110010 4
7 11110010 5

12 21 10110000 3
23 32 10010100 3

56 65 01001010 3
67 76 10001110 4

13 31 10010000 2 match 2
24 42 10110001 4

50 05 01100010 3
